fields.description: Canonical id matching the frontend slug-style key (e.g. "aimoga-mornine"). Becomes the doc name.
fields.label: Product ID

fields.description: URL slug for the public PDP route (e.g. "aimoga-mornine"). Usually equal to product_id.
fields.label: Slug

fields.description: Reference to the matching ERPNext Item used for Quotations / Sales Orders. Auto-set by the Phase 3.5 sync command (iranrobot_backend.commands.sync_to_erpnext.run).
fields.label: ERPNext Item

fields.description: Uncheck to keep the product as Draft (hidden from public APIs). Phase 2 public endpoints will filter on is_published=1.
fields.label: Is Published

fields.description: Marks this product as the homepage Editor's Pick featured card. At most one product should be featured at a time (admin convention).
fields.label: Is Featured

fields.description: Surfaces this product under the New Arrivals filter.
fields.label: Is New Arrival

fields.description: Sort order within a category (lower = first). Defaults to 0.
fields.label: Display Order

fields.description: Top-level form-factor category (e.g. Humanoids, Quadrupeds, AMRs, Drones, UGVs, Accessories). Must be a Robot Category without a parent.
fields.label: Category

fields.description: Optional subcategory (e.g. Bipedal Humanoids). Must be a Robot Category whose parent_category equals the chosen Category.
fields.label: Subcategory
Use Cases (Solutions)
fields.description: Application / use-case taxonomy. Orthogonal to category/subcategory. A product can belong to multiple use cases (e.g. a quadruped suitable for both inspection and security).
Use Cases this product solves. Each row links to a Robot Use Case (warehouse, security, inspection, healthcare, education, custom, ...).
fields.label: Use Cases

fields.description: Persian display name.
fields.label: Product Name (fa)

fields.description: English display name.
fields.label: Product Name (en)

fields.description: Manufacturer / brand name. Kept in Latin script per project convention (e.g. "Unitree Robotics", "AiMOGA Robotics").
fields.label: Brand

fields.description: Optional model identifier (e.g. "G1 EDU U1").
fields.label: Model

fields.description: Country of manufacture in Persian (e.g. "چین").
fields.label: Origin (fa)

fields.description: Country of manufacture in English (e.g. "China").
fields.label: Origin (en)

fields.description: Short Persian tagline (1–2 sentences).
fields.label: Tagline (fa)

fields.description: Short English tagline (1–2 sentences).
fields.label: Tagline (en)

fields.description: Long Persian description (rendered on PDP).
fields.label: Description (fa)

fields.description: Long English description (rendered on PDP).
fields.label: Description (en)

fields.description: Drives the green "In stock" badge on PLP and PDP. Uncheck to render "Available on request".
fields.label: In Stock

fields.description: Typical lead time in business days (e.g. 21, 30, 45). Used by the Robot Finder urgency scoring.
fields.label: Lead Time (days)

fields.description: Optional 0–5 star rating. Leave blank for products with no reviews yet (frontend renders empty gray stars).
fields.label: Rating

fields.description: Direct buy is supported. Requires price_usd to be set.
fields.label: Sellable (Buy)

fields.description: Daily rental is supported. Requires rent_per_day_usd to be set.
fields.label: Rentable (Rent)

fields.description: Customer can request a quote / procurement. Default = on.
fields.label: Quote / Source (Procure)

fields.description: Direct purchase price in USD. Required when Sellable (Buy) is checked.
fields.label: Price (USD)

fields.description: Daily rental rate in USD. Required when Rentable (Rent) is checked.
fields.label: Rent per Day (USD)

fields.description: Persian label shown on PLP/PDP when no numeric price is set.
fields.label: Price Label (fa)

fields.description: English label shown on PLP/PDP when no numeric price is set.
fields.label: Price Label (en)

fields.description: Product gallery. Exactly one row should have Is Hero checked (validated server-side).
fields.label: Images

fields.description: Bilingual spec rows (Persian + English label/value).
fields.label: Specs
